title: SlashBlade: Surpass
description: ​To make SlashBlade: Resharped weapon perform better.​​
body:
Breakthrough Limits!!!!!!This mod overhauls the combat mechanics of "**[SlashBlade: Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped)**", pushing its weapon performance beyond conventional balance!!!​
All changes introduced by this mod are configurable via files, allowing players to toggle features on or off.

**Current Features:**
- ​Targeting Toggle Key: Disable targeting so the ​Sneak key​ no longer locks onto targets.
- Extended Crosshair Targeting Range: Lock onto targets precisely where you aim.
- ​Crosshair Targeting Assist: Never miss a lock-on again.
- ​Wider Area Targeting: "Spider Sense" for broader threat detection.
- Customizable Targeting Turn Speed: Adjust how fast targeting rotates your view.
- ​Mid-Air Dash: Evade attacks while airborne.
- ​Combo Interruption Key: Break out of combos instantly.
- Configurable Slow Falling: Control your descent.

​All features can be configured server-side.



**If you have ideas or bugs,plz:**
[Issues · Arcomit/surpass](https://github.com/Arcomit/surpass/issues)
or
[Pull requests · Arcomit/surpass](https://github.com/Arcomit/surpass/pulls)

Github:
[Arcomit/surpass: 超越限制，重锋附属](https://github.com/Arcomit/surpass)

License：
[GPL-3.0 license](https://github.com/Arcomit/surpass#GPL-3.0-1-ov-file)

———————————————————

超越限制，该模组旨在让 **[拔刀剑：重锋](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped)** 的性能更加卓越。​
但本模组所更改的内容均已提供配置文件，玩家可自行开启或关闭。

**目前提供的特性：**
- 提供索敌开关按键，关闭索敌后【潜行键】将不再进行索敌；
- 更长的准星索敌距离，指哪锁哪；
- 准星索敌辅瞄，再也不用担心锁不到人啦；
- 更长的范围索敌，蜘蛛感应；
- 可配置的索敌转视角速度；
- 空中闪避；
- 打断连招按键；
- 可配置的缓降效果；

所有功能可通过服务端配置。



**有想法或bug，请：**
[Issues · Arcomit/surpass](https://github.com/Arcomit/surpass/issues)
或
[Pull requests · Arcomit/surpass](https://github.com/Arcomit/surpass/pulls)
